title: Billing Contact access to invoices

posts.author: basiliopoulos (Basile Aloy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Give Billing Contacts access to invoices.

Today, only Admins have that access, for reasons of privacy/security.

I as Admin can decide whether someone is Admin or not and can access all the account information.

I as Admin can put someone as billing contact and they get a whole bunch of emails but access to nothing useful (i.e. the invoices).

If I can give someone access as admin then why can’t i give someone granular access to invoices.

In my view it’s a design mistake

At the end of the day - my identity is ‘breached’ if I give someone admin details.

Why can’t i breach it for the billing contact ?
